lowDiskSpace.toast.message: Your startup disk is running low on space: {freeText} free ({percentText}%).

@lowDiskSpace.toast.message.description: Body of the persistent in-app warning toast when the startup (boot) disk is low on free space, e.g. 'Your startup disk is running low on space: 4.2 GB free (3.1%).'. 'startup disk' is the macOS term for the boot volume.

placeholders.freeText: amount of free space, already formatted with its unit (e.g. 4.2 GB)
placeholders.percentText: free space as a percentage, already formatted to one decimal (e.g. 3.1)

@lowDiskSpace.toast.disable.description: Button on the low-disk-space warning toast that turns the warning off and opens its settings. A short button label.

@lowDiskSpace.toast.closeTooltip.description: Tooltip on the small close (x) button of the low-disk-space warning toast. A short verb.

lowDiskSpace.notification.title: Low disk space

@lowDiskSpace.notification.title.description: Title of the macOS system notification warning that the startup disk is low on space. A short headline.

@lowDiskSpace.notification.body.description: Body of the macOS system notification warning of low disk space, e.g. '4.2 GB free (3.1%) on your startup disk.'. 'startup disk' is the macOS term for the boot volume.

placeholders.freeText: amount of free space, already formatted with its unit (e.g. 4.2 GB)
placeholders.percentText: free space as a percentage, already formatted to one decimal (e.g. 3.1)
